title: Spirit Airlines to Shut Down After 34 Years, Ceases Operations Immediately
body: Spirit Airlines is shutting down after 34 years, canceling all flights immediately after failing to secure a government bailout.

title: GoTo, Grab Review Indonesia’s New Rule Raising Driver Pay Share
body: GoTo and Grab review Indonesia’s new rule raising driver pay to 92%, as firms assess impact on costs, pricing and industry sustainability.

title: Danantara Responds to Claims of Buying Online Motor Taxi Shares
body: Danantara says it "continually evaluates diverse market opportunities" amid claims that the fund has bought ride-hailing apps's shares.

title: Timah Profit Surges 1,184% as Output Jumps and Tin Prices Rally
body: Timah posts 1,184% profit jump in Q1 as output, sales and tin prices surge, beating targets and signaling continued growth momentum.

title: ASEAN Agrees to Avoid ‘Unnecessary’ Trade Barriers as Iran Crisis Stings
body: ASEAN says any emergency measures must be temporary, and not create unnecessary barriers to trade as the group deals with the Iran crisis.

title: Indonesia Posts Rp 240 Trillion Budget Deficit in Q1 2026
body: Tax revenue remained the primary driver -- rising 20.7% -- but customs and excise revenue fell 12.6%.

title: Indonesia Caps Ride-Hailing Commissions at 8% to Protect Drivers
body: Indonesia caps ride-hailing commissions at 8% and expands social protections, aiming to boost welfare for over 4 million drivers

body: New projects are expected to lift the company’s total geothermal capacity to more than 1,000 MW by the end of 2026.

body: Indonesia makes local content certification free and simpler for small industries to boost access to government procurement.

body: The result already accounts for roughly half of the company’s projected full-year net profit.

title: Palm Oil Seen Up 8% in 2026 as Supply Caps Gains, World Bank Says
body: World Bank sees palm oil rising 8% in 2026, with supply growth and higher costs capping further gains.

title: Bukit Asam Q1 Profit More Than Doubles Despite Slight Revenue Dip
body: The profit increase was driven by stronger global coal prices, which supported margins despite softer top-line performance.

title: Unilever Indonesia Q1 Net Profit Rises 14% to Rp1.25 Trillion
body: The improved performance extends a recovery trend in both revenue and earnings that has been underway since the second half of 2025.

title: Rupiah Sinks to All-Time Low, Economist Warns of Overshooting
body: Rupiah falls to Rp 17,346 as Fed holds rates, with economists warning of overshooting and urging Bank Indonesia to act.

title: Amman Mineral Swings to $163 Million Q1 Profit
body: The company obtained a temporary permit on Oct. 31, 2025, to export concentrate for six months through April 30, 2026.

title: Tax Office Assures Data Security as Coretax System Under Scrutiny
body: Indonesia’s tax office says taxpayer data is secure and regularly audited, as concerns persist over its Coretax digital system.

title: Rupiah Drops to Rp 17,353 as Oil Risks, Fed Jitters Weigh
body: Rupiah falls to Rp 17,353 as US-Iran tensions and Fed leadership uncertainty drive demand for the dollar.

title: JCI Falls 2% on Oil Surge Fears, Weak Rupiah and Fed Policy Uncertainty
body: JCI drops 2% as US–Iran tensions, fuel price hikes, and rupiah weakness trigger broad sell-off across sectors.
